subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses as He willeth! There is none other God but Him, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise, and He hath distinguished them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات کیف اراد لا اله الا هو المنزل العلیم الحکیم و اختصها
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @apocalyptic imagery, @living waters; water of life
